description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing openjfx via apt-get. Define a single stage "deploy" and four jobs: build_jdk11, build_jdk17, build_jdk21, and build_jdk23. Each job uses the Maven Docker image with the corresponding Eclipse Temurin JDK version (11, 17, 21, 23) and runs "mvn verify --batch-mode". The build_jdk23 job also publishes the built JAR files from target/*.jar as artifacts that expire in 6 weeks and includes JUnit test reports from target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.xml. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
